metadata.sourceNote: Synthetic local JSON dataset created for AP CSP computational artifact demonstration.

courses.title: Pre-AP Chinese Literature Lab
courses.description: Close reading, argument structure, and public-facing writing for ninth grade students.
courses.impact: Builds communication access for students who are entering bilingual academic writing.

courses.title: Chinese Classics & Modern Identity
courses.description: Classical texts, modern civic identity, and seminar-based essay critique.
courses.impact: Connects cultural literacy with contemporary public reasoning.

courses.title: Chinese Research Seminar
courses.description: Long-form humanities research with source evaluation and oral defense.
courses.impact: Improves evidence literacy for civic and academic communication.

courses.title: Chinese Humanities Capstone
courses.description: Senior thesis course connecting literature, philosophy, and social context.
courses.impact: Creates a polished research artifact for college-level humanities readiness.

courses.title: English Rhetoric Studio 9
courses.description: Rhetorical reading, vocabulary systems, and short analytical composition.
courses.impact: Makes academic English more navigable for new AP-track students.

courses.title: Honors English Language Workshop
courses.description: Argument, synthesis, and style workshop for students entering AP writing.
courses.impact: Prepares students to use language as a tool for influence and analysis.

courses.title: AP English Language & Composition
courses.description: College-level rhetoric, synthesis essays, and timed argument analysis.
courses.impact: Strengthens civic argument and media literacy under time pressure.

courses.title: AP English Literature & Composition
courses.description: Advanced literary interpretation, close reading, and college essay discussion.
courses.impact: Develops empathy and analytical depth through complex narratives.

courses.title: Integrated Mathematics 9
courses.description: Algebra, geometry, and modeling fundamentals for AP pathway entry.
courses.impact: Reduces readiness gaps by making quantitative skills explicit early.

courses.title: Honors Precalculus
courses.description: Functions, trigonometry, analytic geometry, and modeling discipline.
courses.impact: Creates the bridge from school math to calculus-based disciplines.

courses.title: AP Calculus AB
courses.description: Limits, derivatives, integrals, and real-world rate models.
courses.impact: Expands access to STEM majors by formalizing college calculus readiness.

courses.title: AP Calculus BC
courses.description: Advanced calculus sequence with series, parametric, and polar models.
courses.impact: Signals rigorous quantitative preparation for competitive STEM pathways.

courses.title: Post-AP Linear Algebra
courses.description: Vector spaces, transformations, eigenvalues, and machine-learning foundations.
courses.impact: Makes abstract math visible as infrastructure for AI and engineering.

courses.title: AP Statistics
courses.description: Sampling, inference, regression, and uncertainty for real decisions.
courses.impact: Transforms school decisions from anecdotes into measurable evidence.

courses.title: Conceptual Physics 9
courses.description: Motion, energy, waves, and lab reasoning for early science identity.
courses.impact: Builds confidence for students entering lab-based AP science sequences.

courses.title: Honors Chemistry
courses.description: Atomic structure, bonding, reactions, and quantitative lab technique.
courses.impact: Links molecular reasoning to medicine, environment, and materials science.

courses.title: AP Chemistry
courses.description: Thermodynamics, kinetics, equilibrium, and advanced lab inquiry.
courses.impact: Reveals how chemical systems shape health, energy, and environmental choices.

courses.title: Honors Biology
courses.description: Cells, genetics, ecology, and experimental design foundations.
courses.impact: Connects personal health decisions to biological systems thinking.

courses.title: AP Biology
courses.description: Cellular processes, evolution, gene expression, and data-heavy lab modeling.
courses.impact: Builds literacy for biotechnology and public health debates.

courses.title: AP Physics 1
courses.description: Mechanics, energy, rotation, waves, and lab argumentation.
courses.impact: Shows how physics turns physical intuition into testable models.

courses.title: AP Physics C: Mechanics
courses.description: Calculus-based mechanics, modeling, and experimental uncertainty.
courses.impact: Prepares students for engineering systems where math and physics converge.

courses.title: Global Systems 9
courses.description: Geography, historical patterns, and systems thinking for global issues.
courses.impact: Introduces students to large-scale problems before specialization begins.

courses.title: AP World History: Modern
courses.description: World historical change, document analysis, and comparative systems.
courses.impact: Connects past systems to modern globalization and inequality.

courses.title: AP United States History
courses.description: American political, economic, and social history through document-based inquiry.
courses.impact: Strengthens civic reasoning for students entering global universities.

courses.title: AP Microeconomics
courses.description: Markets, incentives, elasticity, and consumer-producer behavior.
courses.impact: Makes everyday campus choices legible through incentives and tradeoffs.

courses.title: AP Macroeconomics
courses.description: National output, inflation, monetary systems, and policy tools.
courses.impact: Connects student futures to economic cycles and policy decisions.

courses.title: AP Computer Science Principles
courses.description: Computing systems, data, algorithms, internet impact, and creative artifacts.
courses.impact: Shows how software changes privacy, opportunity, labor, and expression.

courses.title: AP Computer Science A
courses.description: Object-oriented programming, algorithms, arrays, inheritance, and Java design.
courses.impact: Turns computational thinking into production-grade implementation habits.

courses.title: AI Ethics & Prompt Security Studio
courses.description: Prompt injection, model boundaries, bias, and human-centered AI governance.
courses.impact: Prepares students to build with AI while defending users from misuse.

courses.title: Data Journalism & Visualization
courses.description: JSON, charts, evidence narratives, and public data storytelling.
courses.impact: Transforms raw data into arguments communities can understand.

courses.title: Climate Systems Dashboard Lab
courses.description: Energy, emissions, campus operations, and interactive climate dashboards.
courses.impact: Links personal choices and school systems to measurable carbon outcomes.

courses.title: Entrepreneurship & Product Thinking
courses.description: User pain points, prototyping, pricing, and pitch communication.
courses.impact: Encourages students to frame school problems as products with stakeholders.

courses.title: FinTech Modeling Studio
courses.description: Spreadsheets, risk, portfolio models, and ethical financial technology.
courses.impact: Shows how algorithms can expand or restrict financial access.

courses.title: Biotechnology & Public Health
courses.description: Genetics, epidemiology, health equity, and responsible biotechnology.
courses.impact: Connects laboratory science to policy decisions that affect populations.

courses.title: Visual Design Foundations
courses.description: Composition, typography, visual hierarchy, and critique culture.
courses.impact: Improves how students communicate ideas in public digital artifacts.

courses.title: Human-Centered UX Studio
courses.description: Research, wireframes, accessibility, and usability testing.
courses.impact: Helps computing projects serve real users rather than impress only builders.

courses.title: Learning Strategy & Wellbeing
courses.description: Study systems, sleep, stress mapping, and peer support practices.
courses.impact: Makes wellbeing a measurable part of academic planning.

courses.title: Student Leadership Analytics
courses.description: Club operations, survey data, leadership equity, and community metrics.
courses.impact: Turns student leadership from popularity into accountable service.

courses.title: Computing, Law & Platform Power
courses.description: Privacy, platform regulation, algorithmic accountability, and digital rights.
courses.impact: Frames computing as a force that reshapes law, labor, and speech.

courses.title: Senior Impact Product Capstone
courses.description: Teams ship a data-driven campus product with security documentation and a pitch.
courses.impact: Gives students a launchpad for computing artifacts that matter beyond class.
